class.name: InputEventVirtualGesture
class.brief_description: Represents a complex virtual gesture event.
class.description: Input event type for virtual gestures. Used to transmit processed gesture data like swipes, pinches, or custom motions. Subsumes functionality of simple touch drags by providing position, velocity, and acceleration data in a single event.

members.member: The acceleration of the gesture in pixels per second squared.
The change in position since the last event.
Identifier for the type of gesture.
The global position of the gesture.
The pressure applied during the gesture, if available.
The starting global position where the gesture began.
Generic value associated with the gesture (e.g., rotation angle, pinch scale).
The velocity of the gesture in pixels per second.
